question: 'प्रगीतिका' में किस उपसर्ग का प्रयोग है?
summary: 'प्रगीतिका' शब्द में 'प्र' उपसर्ग का प्रयोग हुआ है।

question: 'तुलसीदास' किसकी कविता है?
summary: 'तुलसीदास' सूर्यकांत त्रिपाठी 'निराला' की रचना है।

question: 'गंभीर' का सही विलोम-शब्द है?
summary: 'गंभीर' शब्द का सही विलोम 'विभोर + सार' दिया गया है।

question: 'वैदेही वनवास' किसकी रचना है?
summary: 'वैदेही वनवास' अयोध्यासिंह उपाध्याय 'हरिऔध' की रचना है।

question: निम्न में से पुल्लिंग शब्द का चयन कीजिए।
summary: दिए गए शब्दों में 'पहिया' पुल्लिंग शब्द है।

question: संप्रेषण-कला का विकास किससे होता है?
summary: संप्रेषण-कला का विकास अभ्यास द्वारा होता है।

question: निम्न में संयुक्त व्यंजन कौन-सा नहीं है?
summary: दिए गए विकल्पों में 'य' संयुक्त व्यंजन नहीं है; क्ष, त्र, ज्ञ संयुक्त व्यंजन हैं।

question: 'सूर्यजय' पद में कौन-सा समास है?
summary: 'सूर्यजय' शब्द में बहुव्रीहि समास है।

question: 'अलंकार' में किस उपसर्ग का प्रयोग है?
summary: 'अलंकार' में 'अलं' उपसर्ग का प्रयोग हुआ है।

question: यह पुस्तक किसकी है? रेखांकित शब्द का पद-परिचय दीजिए।
summary: 'यह' का पद-परिचय सार्वनामिक विशेषण, एकवचन, स्त्रीलिंग है।

question: 'विश्लेषण' शब्द का विलोम होगा-
summary: 'विश्लेषण' शब्द का विलोम 'संश्लेषण' होता है।

question: किसी व्यक्ति के ऊपर के दाँतों पर जीभ लगाने से होने है, उसे क्या कहते हैं?
summary: ऊपर के दाँतों पर जीभ लगाने से उच्चारित ध्वनियाँ मूर्धन्य व्यंजन कहलाती हैं।

question: 'अत्यधिक' का विलोम क्या है?
summary: 'अत्यधिक' का विलोम 'अत्याल्प' होता है।

question: 'ज्ञान' का विलोम क्या है?
summary: 'ज्ञान' शब्द का विलोम 'अज्ञान' (अविज्ञान) होता है।

question: 'संकल्प' शब्द में उपसर्ग बताइए।
summary: 'संकल्प' शब्द में 'सं' उपसर्ग लगा हुआ है।

question: मुझसे यह भी हुआ नहीं जाता। इस वाक्य का प्रयोग होगा-
summary: 'मुझसे यह भी हुआ नहीं जाता' वाक्य भाववाच्य का उदाहरण है।

question: तद्भव और हिन्दी तत्सम का कौन-सा मेल गलत है?
summary: तत्सम-तद्भव में 'आदर्श-आदर्शम' का मेल गलत है।

question: लेखक और उसकी रचना का कौन-सा जोड़ा गलत है?
options: संस्कृति के घर अध्याय- रामधारी सिंह 'दिनकर'
अशोक के फूल- आचार्य हजारी प्रसाद द्विवेदी
summary: लेखक-रचना में 'रसो-स्तन- आचार्य महावीर प्रसाद द्विवेदी' जोड़ा गलत है।

subject: भाग-III : अंग्रेजी (वैकल्पिक भाषा-II)
question: Which of the following words is 'plural'?
summary: 'Mice' is a plural word because it is the plural form of 'mouse'.

subject: भाग-III : अंग्रेजी (वैकल्पिक भाषा-II)
question: Which of the following words is regarded as singular?
summary: 'Mathematics' itself is a complete singular word; subject name is always singular.

subject: भाग-III : अंग्रेजी (वैकल्पिक भाषा-II)
question: Which of the following sentences is in active voice?
options: He was asked to keep quiet.
A house was bought for fifty lacs.
I requested him to come in time.
summary: In active voice the subjects acts; 'I requested him to come in time.' is active.

subject: भाग-III : अंग्रेजी (वैकल्पिक भाषा-II)
question: Which of the following sentences is in passive voice?
options: I kept quiet throughout the meeting.
He was assisted by a group of students.
They came late and lost the match.
summary: In passive voice the subject receives the action; 'He was assisted by a group of students.' is passive.

subject: भाग-III : अंग्रेजी (वैकल्पिक भाषा-II)
question: "That is the man he prefer was seeking." In the above sentence, what is the status of the two 'the's'?
summary: 'A', 'An' and 'The' are articles; 'The' is a definite article.

subject: भाग-III : अंग्रेजी (वैकल्पिक भाषा-II)
question: "These students are most disobedient." In the above sentence, what is the gender of the word 'students'.
summary: Common Gender deals with both masculine and feminine; 'students' can be male or female.

subject: भाग-III : अंग्रेजी (वैकल्पिक भाषा-II)
question: "He was going along the road", point out the tense.
summary: Past Continuous rule: subject + was/were + v1+ing + object; 'He was going along the road' is past continuous.

subject: भाग-III : अंग्रेजी (वैकल्पिक भाषा-II)
question: Language learning starts from
summary: Language learning starts from listening; child listens first then produces words.

subject: भाग-III : अंग्रेजी (वैकल्पिक भाषा-II)
question: What is the main purpose of poetry recitation in a language classroom?
options: To know the historical background of the poem
To enjoy and appreciate the poem
To give their opinions about poem
To become aware of the poet and his/her work
summary: The main purpose of poetry recitation is to enjoy and appreciate the poem.

subject: भाग-III : अंग्रेजी (वैकल्पिक भाषा-II)
question: Fill in the blanks with the correct article : Yesterday I saw .......... European riding on .......... elephant.
summary: 'European' takes 'a' (yu sound) and 'Elephant' takes 'an' (vowel sound), so 'a, an'.

subject: भाग-III : अंग्रेजी (वैकल्पिक भाषा-II)
question: Choose the correct sentence :
options: Please describe to me the story.
summary: 'Describe' is not followed by a preposition; 'Please describe the story.' is correct.

subject: भाग-III : अंग्रेजी (वैकल्पिक भाषा-II)
question: Fill in the blank with correct preposition : A prisoner was accused .......... murder.
summary: 'Accused of' is the correct collocation; accused of murder.

subject: भाग-III : अंग्रेजी (वैकल्पिक भाषा-II)
question: The antonym of 'innocent' is
summary: The correct antonym of 'innocent' is 'guilty'.

subject: भाग-III : अंग्रेजी (वैकल्पिक भाषा-II)
question: The synonym of 'significant' is
summary: The correct synonym of 'significant' is 'important'.

subject: भाग-III : अंग्रेजी (वैकल्पिक भाषा-II)
question: Which one of the following words can be made plural by adding a suffix 'en'?
summary: Suffix 'en' makes select letters words plural; Ox + en = Oxen.

subject: भाग-III : अंग्रेजी (वैकल्पिक भाषा-II)
question: Choose the correct pronoun to complete the following sentence : This dress is .......... and that one is mine.
summary: 'Yours' is the correct possessive pronoun; This dress is yours.

subject: भाग-III : अंग्रेजी (वैकल्पिक भाषा-II)
question: Change the following sentence into passive voice : Have the girls asked this question?
options: This question have asked by girls
Has this question been asked by the girls?
Has this question asked by the girls?
Have this question asked by the girls?
summary: Passive of Present Perfect interrogative: change into present perfect continuous Tense (has been, have been).

subject: भाग-III : अंग्रेजी (वैकल्पिक भाषा-II)
question: Which kind of noun is Gangapur?
summary: Gangapur is a name of place and a Proper Noun; spelled with an initial capital letter.

subject: भाग-III : अंग्रेजी (वैकल्पिक भाषा-II)
question: Which part of speech is the word 'brave'?
summary: 'Brave' is an Adjective; adjectives are one of the eight parts of speech that tells more about a noun.

subject: भाग-III : अंग्रेजी (वैकल्पिक भाषा-II)
question: Which of the following words is a material noun?
summary: Material Noun refers to a material or substance like gold; Gold is a material noun.

subject: भाग-III : अंग्रेजी (वैकल्पिक भाषा-II)
question: Which of the following words is an abstract noun?
summary: Abstract noun refers to an idea or a general quality, not a physical object; Connection is abstract.

subject: भाग-III : अंग्रेजी (वैकल्पिक भाषा-II)
question: Which kind of noun is 'adversity'?
summary: Adversity is an Abstract Noun.

subject: भाग-III : अंग्रेजी (वैकल्पिक भाषा-II)
question: Which part of speech is the word 'hard' in the sentence 'He is working hard'?
summary: Adverb: a word that can be used before noun, verb, a phrase or another verb; 'hard' is an adverb here.

subject: भाग-III : अंग्रेजी (वैकल्पिक भाषा-II)
question: Which of the following sentences has a 'conjunction'?
options: She is up to jumpt tomorrow.
She is poor but she is by nature hospitable.
summary: Conjunction is a word used for joining other words, phrases or sentences; 'but' joins here.

subject: भाग-III : अंग्रेजी (वैकल्पिक भाषा-II)
question: Point out the sentence which is in present perfect tense.
options: I shall go to Jaunpur tomorrow.
summary: Rule of Present Perfect Tense: Sub + have/has + v3 form + object; 'I have finished my work.' is present perfect.

subject: भाग-III : अंग्रेजी (वैकल्पिक भाषा-II)
question: Which of the following is a misspelt word?
summary: 'Desiccation' is correct (निर्जलीकरण); 'Dessication' is misspelt.

subject: भाग-III : अंग्रेजी (वैकल्पिक भाषा-II)
question: Which of the following sentences has a transitive verb?
options: She walks in the morning daily.
I killed a snake last night.
summary: Transitive verb requires an object; 'I killed a snake last night.' has a transitive verb.

subject: भाग-III : अंग्रेजी (वैकल्पिक भाषा-II)
question: Which of the following sentences is negative?
options: I come from a rich family.
You can do all this to me time.
He does not listen to me.
summary: Negative sentence uses Not/Never; 'He does not listen to me.' is negative.

subject: भाग-III : अंग्रेजी (वैकल्पिक भाषा-II)
question: Which of the following sentence is exclamatory?
options: What a piece of work is man.
What do you know about ancient India.
summary: Exclamatory sentence conveys excitement or emotion; 'What a piece of work is man.' is exclamatory.

subject: भाग-III : अंग्रेजी (वैकल्पिक भाषा-II)
question: Point out the complex sentence.
options: One who does not love one's country is a wretched person.
summary: Complex sentence has one or more independent clauses; 'One who does not love one's country is a wretched person.' is complex.
